description: Close the support ticket 'URGENT: Broken Blade on Mower' by setting its status to 'Closed', adding the comment 'Field technician completed repair on site.', and recording the resolution as 'Replaced primary cutting blade and balanced deck.'. Additionally, update the asset 'Mower ZTR-5000-A1' to 'In Service' status with the date in service set to '2026-03-09'.
